results.rendered_html: yuga—pad ind. ‘being in the same yoke or by the side of each other’, together, at the same time, simultaneously (‘with’ instr.  Pāṇ. ii, 1, 6 , Sch.; cf. yuga-śaram),  GṛŚrS.  &c. &c.

results.rendered_html:
yugapad , nach Andern yugapad (yuga + 2. pad) adv. gaṇa svarādi zu  P. 1,1,37 . gleichzeitig, zugleich (urspr. in demselben Joch stehend, neben einander); Gegens. kramaśas, pṛthak.  AK. 3,5,22 . yugapadutpanna  NIR. 1,2 . ˚padbhāva  KĀTY. ŚR. 1,5,1 . 7,1 . 2,4,25 . 5,19 . 3,6,17 . ˚patkarman  LĀṬY. 1,9,1 . [Page6-0147] ˚patprāpti  ĀŚV. GṚHY. 4,4,5 . yugapattu pralīyante yadā tasminmahātmani  M. 1,54 .  BHAG. 11,12 .  MBH. 3,11956 .  HARIV. 11765 . 11768 .  R. 2,72,41 .  R. GORR. 2,68,29 . 4,21,4 . 5,25,56 . 6,94,23 .  KAṆ. 2,2,6 .  SĀṂKHYAK. 30 .  ŚĀK. 77. ad. 69,2 .  RAGH. 4,15 . 5,68 .  KUMĀRAS. 2,18 .  ŚIŚ. 9,41 .  VARĀH. BṚH. S. 11,37 . 40,4 . 88,37 . 95,43 .  KATHĀS. 21,43 . 117 . 26,278 . 34,256 . 42,70 .  BHĀG. P. 2,4,9 . 3,6,2 . 11,24 . 4,10,8 .  Ind. St. 8,311,1 v. u.  Schol. zu  JAIM. 1,1,15 . zu  NAIṢ. 22,46 . cakreṇa yugapat = sacakram Schol. zu  P. 2,1,6 .  VOP. 6,61 . a˚  SĀṂKHYAK. 18 .
— Vgl. yaugapadya.
